description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python Lib that runs on push to main, devel, and deploy branches and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: a develop-matrix job that runs on multiple OS and Python versions, and a deploy job that runs on ubuntu-latest and depends on develop-matrix. The develop-matrix job checks out the code, sets up Python, installs the library, runs pytest, builds a wheel, and archives build artifacts. The deploy job checks out the code, sets up Python, installs twine, downloads build artifacts, inspects dist files, and uploads to PyPI using twine with credentials from secrets.
